subcodes.title: PUASA
subcodes.first_line:
## PUASA

Tau disebut sebedau muka puasa

 Puji meh ngagai Nuan, O Tuhan Petara aku! Kami udah ngintu Puasa nitihka pint
subcodes.notes: auto-unlinked (moderate-ratio) from AB00169MAI — Header 'PUASA' (Fasting) different prayer about observing the Fast, not the AB00169MAI prayer
